summary.summary: Adds auto-scrolling behavior to the Treatments view by introducing a ScrollAnchor enum and scrollAnchor(for:) helper, wrapping the List in a ScrollViewReader, assigning IDs to the carbs, fat/protein, and bolus fields, and adding an onChange handler on focusedField that scrolls to the appropriate field with a small delay and animation. (See diff and modified file.) [diff:73c30818aa39] [file:2aa37fe7a0e7]
summary.userFacingImpact: When the focused input field changes, the list will automatically scroll to bring the corresponding field (carbs, fat+protein, or bolus) into view; the code uses a small 0.05s DispatchQueue delay so the keyboard frame change can settle, and the scroll is animated. This should reduce the need for the user to manually scroll to the active field. [diff:73c30818aa39] [file:2aa37fe7a0e7]
